items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a speed edge over Cody Gibson on the feet due to his Southpaw stance and kickboxing game.
items.quote: I feel like striking wise, little bit of that speed edge over the Cody Gibson side. Kind of a bladed karate striking stance... and it's smooth.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is pretty big for the 135-pound weight class at 5 foot 10 with a 71-inch reach.
items.quote: Cody Gibson can physically overwhelm people at 135 pounds because he's pretty big for the weight class. 5 foot 10, 71 in reach.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and in the final phase of his career.
items.quote: 38 years old kind of in that final phase

items.claim: Narulo Aliev frequently wins via competitive decisions and is not a finisher.
items.quote: he squeaks by with these competitive decision wins every single time. He doesn't do a lot of damage... he's not a finisher at all. He's Mr. Decision Merchant.

items.claim: Mike Davis had breathing issues during his fight against Feres Ziam because the locker rooms had just been repainted.
items.quote: there was the uh you know, inside info after the fact that came out like they had just repainted the locker rooms. Mike Davis said he couldn't breathe.
